item.title: Mike’s Blackberry Fountain™
item.description:
A friend’s idea about training a Blackberry

I was chatting with a forest garden friend of mine about why his neighbour is tying his Hazel poles together. http://localhost:1313/blog/240121-mikes-blackberry-fountain/
